data.revised_prompt:
Create one clean HD 2D game sprite animation sheet for a controllable player character, arranged as exactly 2 rows by 2 columns with exactly 4 equal invisible cells, read left-to-right across rows. Solid flat chroma-key background #FF00FF only, no gradients, no texture, no floor, no shadow, no borders, no visible grid lines, no text.

Character: same Samsara Ascension jade-white female xianxia cultivator identity; elegant young cultivator with long dark ink hair, one jade-and-gold hair ornament, small forehead gem, white and pale-jade robes with light gold trim, a few translucent teal ribbons, slim jade sword kept close to the body. Clean HD hand-painted 2D fantasy RPG asset, crisp silhouette, simplified readable costume, not photorealistic, not 3D, not pixel art.

Action: walking cycle with real pose changes, not camera movement or scaling. Full body visible, three-quarter RPG view from slightly above, centered in each cell, same body height and same pixel scale in every frame, subject fills about 60 to 65 percent of each cell, generous margin on all sides. Feet/bottom anchor line stable in every cell. Entire character, sword, hair, sleeves, ribbons, robe hem, and any tiny attached qi accent must fit fully inside each cell; nothing crosses cell edges.

Frame directions and poses: top-left: right foot forward and left foot back, body leaning slightly forward, sword balanced close to body. Top-right: passing step, both feet near center, body rises slightly, arms counter-swing, ribbons trail backward. Bottom-left: left foot forward and right foot back, body weight clearly shifted, robe opens with the stride. Bottom-right: passing step returning to neutral, body lowers slightly, arms counter-swing opposite; loop clearly reads as walking. Preserve exact same character identity, costume colors, face/eyes, hair ornament, robe palette, sword design, and material language in every frame; only body pose, clothing motion, hair/ribbon motion, and compact attached qi accent may change.

No projectile, no impact burst, no large slash arc, no dust cloud, no detached effects outside the main silhouette, no alternate character, no redesign, no cropped feet, no inconsistent scale, no photorealism, no 3D render, no UI.
